transcript.text:
[Tzuyang is the best?!]
[First challenger in South Korea]
[3.5kg?!]
[This came all the way from Japan...]
[An unimaginable size of Mazesoba] (Soupless Ramen)
[Representing South Korea]
[Will get it done no matter what!]
[Will she be the very first person in Korea to beat this challenge?]
[You can do it!!] Thank you
Hello everyone
I'm here to do a challenge mukbang
[The perfect weather to do one]
Going to eat Mazesoba
The person that came out with Taiwan Mazesoba contacted me personally
Hello Tzuyang
My name is Niiyama Naoto, the creator of Taiwan Mazesoba

Please to meet you
I'm genuinely grateful that South Koreans show lots of love for my dish
The 3.5kg Mazesoba Challenge is already popular in Japan
And I would like Tzuyang to be the very person to tackle this challenge in Korea
Do not think about the time limit Just enjoy the dish and taste the flavors of the dish
I'll be rooting for you Tzuyang!
Cheers to you! Fighting!
[Menya Hanabi]
[Let's go]
Hello
I'm here
This restaurant is usually very packed
But I got invited during their break time
So it's pretty empty
Just for Tzuyang, our country's best YouTuber,
We requested and made a bowl for this challenge

I wanted to do this for her Because dreams come true
This place is very popular
But we don't let people film mukbangs
So then I'm the first person
How big is it?
About 3.5kgs
That's a lot
-Is there a time limit? -Unlimited time
But you can time yourself just to see how fast you can eat it
So as long as I finish it
I'll give you the giant bowl if you do it
I really want it
Fighting!
[6 batches of noodles]
[Mazesoba (soupless ramen noodles)]
[How will she eat it all?]

[It's here]
Looks delicious
It's a lot of food but looks good
No need to stress about time,
but can we time it since this is a historical moment?
Of course I would like to know as well
This is a 1-serving bowl
[For size comparison]
[Tiny]
A huge difference
This is 6 bowls Even 6 eggs
Starts when I eat or when I mix?
When you eat
It's sad to mix because it's plated so nicely
[Takes pic]
Let's mix it up now since I got the photo

This is a lot of food
This is no joke
The chopsticks are going to break
It feels like it'll break
-You can do it! -Thank you
Can I start eating? Bon appetit!
Ready, start!
Delicious
Best Mazesoba I've ever had
[Just enjoying the food]
That's so good
Seasoned perfectly
A little salty
The last time I had Mazesoba, it was way too salty
This is just about right
Tasty

The thick sauce and its flavors
This is it
This regular bowl is like a small plate
The noodles are also very chewy
No strong taste of flour Very delicious
I can taste the noodles, beef, and the green onions
Really good
So good
The best Mazesoba I've ever had
[3 minutes]
[Never-ending]
This is like 1 bowl right here
For other dishes, I can think of other similar dishes to compare the taste with
But I can't really compare this with anything else
A very distinct flavor Mazesobas have
It's so quiet

It's also our first time seeing the challenge
You're eating very fast
The flavors are very addicting
It just tastes like Mazesoba
Very hard to explain
These noodles are thicker than ramen noodles
Thinner than udon noodles
Watching you eat makes me want to have some too
How long has it been?
8 minutes and 30 seconds
The time doesn't matter so just take your time
But I think 20 minutes is enough
So should we set the standard time as 30 minutes for other challengers?
This will come out as an official challenge here?
Something like "Tzuyang Special"
Or maybe "Tzuyang Mazesoba"

The seasoning on the beef is amazing
But I don't know how to explain it
Just try it
[Flavoring vinegar] They said this is good with it
A little more
I can use a little more
Tasty
It added new flavors
[15 minutes]
There's a lot of sauce on the bottom
So the flavors are getting stronger
I want some hot soup
There are a lot of other dishes too other than Mazesoba
I will try the curry next time
[Some soup on the house]
Thank you

Lovely
[You got this!]
Everybody is so quiet
[She left everyone speechless]
Thank you
It looks like she can eat another bowl of that
[28 minutes]
[Finished]
[3.5kg Mazesoba Challenge]
That took like 30 min, right?
29 minutes and 34 seconds
All while you were explaining the flavors It's impressive
It can be under 20 minutes if you really tried
What a historical moment
I will make it as "Tzuyang Special" if you'd like
Decide the timer for us

29 minutes?
We will discuss that a little more and officially launch this challenge
[Now for the prize]
Thank you
Such a pretty bowl
Thank you
So precious
That's why we're giving it to you
We also opened a Hanabi Curry
We prepared a dish over there as well just for you
Menya Hanabi is the very first place to introduce the dish Mazesoba
And we also catered Mazesoba in Nagoya, Japan during the BTS concert
And the BTS members got to enjoy Mazesoba
And it became a representative food in the city
This tasted so good, good enough to be called the original
You guys can also give this challenge a try once it launches

I will be back to do it again too
Thanks everyone~ [Subtitles by Anthony Hyun Choi] [antchoi91@gmail.com]
